message:
fix(compiler): Output binaries to build/ directory instead of repo root

- Add -o/--output flag and second positional arg support to build command
- When output path is a simple name, place it in build/lib.*/ directory
- Only use output path as-is when it contains / or is absolute

This fixes the issue where `metal0 build app.py myapp --binary` would
create binaries in the repo root instead of the build directory.

Before: ./myapp (repo root)
After:  ./build/lib.macosx-11.0-arm64/myapp
